lex.bot.responsespecification.CfnAbout: Specifies a list of message groups that Amazon Lex uses to respond the user input.

lex.bot.responsespecification.AllowInter.Description: Indicates whether the user can interrupt a speech response from Amazon Lex.

lex.bot.responsespecification.MessageGro.Description: A collection of responses that Amazon Lex can send to the user. Amazon Lex chooses the actual response to send at runtime.
